text: Saturday meetup is on - Alum Creek lower lot, 6:30 AM. Bring hydration.
In. I will bring extra gels.
Forecast looks 62 degrees and dry. Perfect.
Hit a 7:42 mile this morning. Anyone else getting faster off Yasso 800s?
Yes - swap one easy run a week for Yassos. Game changer.
Hoka Bondi 8 vs Brooks Glycerin 21 - thoughts? My knees say cushion, my shoes say no.
Bondi 8 every time for road miles over 5. Glycerin is the trail call.
Sunday wildcard - Highbanks 7 AM. Anyone interested?
First sub-9 long run today. Quietly losing my mind.
yes!! that is the breakthrough you do not announce because you do not want to jinx it.
